g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about STEP and IGES file formats in CAD workflows')
sendPrompt('What is IFC and how is it used in industrial BIM workflows?')
sendPrompt('What mesh formats does meshio support?')
sendPrompt('How do I use pythonocc-core to read a STEP file and extract geometry?')
sendPrompt('How does ifcOpenShell parse IFC files and convert geometry?')
sendPrompt('How does meshio convert between mesh formats?')
sendPrompt('What is a B-Rep (boundary representation) and how is it used downstream?')
sendPrompt('What geometry representations does ifcOpenShell expose?')
sendPrompt('What is the meshio data structure after loading a mesh?')
sendPrompt('What does Layer 2 do with the geometry from Layer 1?')
